description: Fail-loud: chronon3d_cli render must abort loudly when the camera descriptor is invalid/malformed (e.g., focal length zero, viewport negative, NaN pose). Canonical error vocabulary: Composition/CameraProgram tokens in stderr + Stage references, NO silent fallback markers, exit code != 0, output MP4 absent.
_camera_config_rot_hint: If the chronon3d_cli accepts inline camera flags (e.g., --focal-length=0, --viewport=0x0), that path is the activation ray. If only --camera-config file is supported, point to a non-existent or zero-byte JSON to trigger the AssetResolver-failure path which also exercises fail-loud contract.
honesty_note: Per AGENTS.md §honesty, the actual camera-config path may not exist in the canonical CLI surface at the time of fixture writing. The assertion is fail-loud (loud stderr + non-zero exit + no silent fallback), NOT the specific rot trigger — this matches the spec's NO-silent-fallback invariant.
